name: mCURE_ge40_customer_topbottom
source: CURE/raw/Pill_Images via CURE/images normalized Customer JPG hardlinks
selection_rule: keep classes with at least 40 Customer JPG images after merging top and bottom views
view_policy: top and bottom Customer images are used together as samples of the same pill class
class_id_policy: new_class_id is contiguous 0..170; original_class_id preserves CURE raw class id
split_policy: per-class side-stratified 50/50 image split; train gets floor(n/2), test gets the remainder
